summary: Phase 6 (Print Ordering + PayPal) fully validated. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed. Frontend: Super Admin PayPal modal saves & masks secret; Tenant Prints & Orders tab manages sizes and orders; Public share Order Prints modal opens, +/- steppers update total (2x GBP3.50=GBP7.00), email validation blocks empty email, order placed successfully via awaiting_contact path (PayPal not configured) with success toast 'Order received — will be in touch'.

issues: Dimensions input row lacks data-testid (only size-label-N and size-price-N exist, dimension input has no testid) — minor testability gap

action_items: OPTIONAL: add data-testid='size-dim-N' to dimension inputs in AdminSettings print sizes rows for better testability.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend orders.py: PayPal secret correctly masked in GET (only client_id/mode/currency/configured returned). Good.
PUT /super-admin/paypal preserves existing secret when body.secret is empty (allows re-save of client_id without re-entering secret). Confirmed & sensible.
Server computes totals from db.settings print_sizes (client-supplied prices ignored). Verified 2 x GBP3.50 = 7.00.
Zero qty items filtered out; 400 returned if no items or missing email. Good.
MongoDB _id excluded via clean() helper in /admin/orders. Verified.
test_credentials: SA: superadmin/Stu!d10App_2026xQ; Tenant: demo@studio-app.uk/Demo!2026; Share token: eva-ella-27-06-26
seed_data_creation: Created a print order (2x 6x4 = GBP7.00, status contacted then re-created via UI), and tenant print sizes [6x4 £3.50, 8x6 £6.00]. Cleared PayPal config at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal config was cleared at end of tests (client_id emptied). Real PayPal end-to-end payment cannot be tested; only the awaiting_contact path is validated in this env.
